rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. TRAVIS ABERNATHY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Continue Trial Date; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Ashley Klein In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday August 29, 2019 Line 4. PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Continue Trial Date; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Ashley Klein In Support is GRANTED. Trial is continued to September 23, 2019. Mandatory Settlement Conference remains on August 29, 2019. =(501/CFH)
